narrative:
Marion/Summerfield (precinct in Noble County) has 349 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.0 percentage points.
